description: Dashboard Multi-Project UX: Overview page, drill-down, and setup wizard

log.action: Moved to triage for re-specification — new dependency added

log.outcome: This specification describes a comprehensive multi-project dashboard UX with Projects Overview, drill-down navigation, and a Setup Wizard. While the feature set is well-conceived, the spec has critical dependency issues: it assumes KB-500 (CentralCoreStore) and KB-501 (ProjectRuntimeManager) are complete, but examination shows these types and APIs do not exist in the codebase. The spec needs inline type definitions as fallbacks, or must wait for dependencies.

The specification describes a substantial multi-project dashboard feature with three interconnected UI surfaces (overview page, drill-down, setup wizard). While the UX design is well-thought-out and the step breakdown is logical, there are **critical dependency issues** that must be resolved before implementation can proceed. The spec references KB-500 (CentralCore, ProjectRegistry) and KB-501 (HybridExecutor, ProjectRuntime) which do not exist in the codebase. Additionally, the testing requirem

This is a high-quality specification for a substantial multi-project dashboard UX. The mission is clear, steps have concrete verifiable outcomes, and file scope is accurate based on my review of the existing codebase. Dependencies on KB-500/KB-501 are appropriately declared. The testing requirements demand real automated tests with assertions, which aligns with the existing test infrastructure.
